# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV = "PLUGIN_MODULES";
const DEFAULT_MODULE_PARAM = "module";
const DEFAULT_MODULES_PARAM = "modules";

type LoadedModule = {
  specifier: string;
  ok: boolean;
  exports?: string[];
  error?: string;
};

function getEnvModules(): string[] {
  const raw = Deno.env.get(DEFAULT_MODULES_ENV) ?? "";
  return raw
    .split(",")
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function getQueryModules(url: URL): string[] {
  const modules: string[] = [];

  for (const value of url.searchParams.getAll(DEFAULT_MODULE_PARAM)) {
    modules.push(...value.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean));
  }

  for (const value of url.searchParams.getAll(DEFAULT_MODULES_PARAM)) {
    modules.push(...value.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean));
  }

  return modules;
}

function unique(values: string[]): string[] {
  return [...new Set(values)];
}

async function loadModule(specifier: string): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  try {
    const mod = await import(specifier);
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: true,
      exports: Object.keys(mod),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  }
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const envModules = getEnvModules();
  const queryModules = getQueryModules(url);
  const requestedModules = unique([...envModules, ...queryModules]);

  const results = await Promise.all(requestedModules.map(loadModule));

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify(
      {
        runtime: "deno-deploy",
        configuredFromEnv: envModules,
        configuredFromQuery: queryModules,
        requestedModules,
        results,
      },
      null,
      2,
    ),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      },
    },
  );
});
